assertions.reason: Targeted Hardhat coverage proved RiskAdapter.quote() inline math matches the DeterministicRiskModel quote engine across five utilization levels, and a borrow path emitted QuoteVerified when quoteViaTicket verified the PVM quote engine match.
evidence: Command: npx hardhat test --no-compile test/UnifiedRiskGateway.ts test/BatchLiquidation.ts
Passed test: test/UnifiedRiskGateway.ts:42 inline math matches DeterministicRiskModel.quote() for 5 utilization levels
Passed test: test/UnifiedRiskGateway.ts:122 cross-VM verification emits QuoteVerified when inline matches PVM engine

Source refs: contracts/RiskAdapter.sol:89 quote(), contracts/RiskAdapter.sol:98 quoteViaTicket(), contracts/RiskAdapter.sol:110 inline canonical compute, contracts/RiskAdapter.sol:114/_verifyCrossVM() at 162

assertions.reason: RiskAdapter is AccessManaged and direct quoteViaTicket() calls from unauthorized EOAs reverted with AccessManagedUnauthorized, while the authorized LendingCore borrow path succeeded and emitted QuoteVerified.
evidence: Passed test: test/UnifiedRiskGateway.ts:91 unauthorized caller to quoteViaTicket reverts with AccessManagedUnauthorized
Passed test: test/UnifiedRiskGateway.ts:122 cross-VM verification emits QuoteVerified when inline matches PVM engine

Source refs: contracts/RiskAdapter.sol:10 contract RiskAdapter is IRiskAdapter, AccessManaged; contracts/RiskAdapter.sol:98 quoteViaTicket() is restricted; contracts/LendingCore.sol:219 and 226 call riskEngine.quoteViaTicket(...)
Role wiring ref: lib/deployment/deployMarketVersion.ts:141-155 grants ROLE_IDS.LENDING_CORE to LendingCore and maps quoteViaTicket selector to that role

assertions.reason: Targeted Hardhat tests proved LendingCore.batchLiquidate() cleared three underwater borrowers in one transaction and the receipt contained three Liquidated events.
evidence: Passed test: test/BatchLiquidation.ts:61 batch liquidates 3 underwater positions in a single TX
Passed test: test/BatchLiquidation.ts:195 emits individual Liquidated events per position in batch
Source refs: contracts/LendingCore.sol:464 batchLiquidate(...); contracts/LendingCore.sol:474 _liquidateOneDelegated external entrypoint for try/catch batching
Test refs: test/BatchLiquidation.ts:94 executes batchLiquidate for 3 borrowers; test/BatchLiquidation.ts:99-105 parses receipt logs and asserts 3 Liquidated events

assertions.reason: Source inspection showed the live source contract is contracts/pvm/DeterministicRiskModel.sol, no source contract file named PvmRiskEngine.sol exists under contracts/, and deployment/test/build code paths reference DeterministicRiskModel.
evidence: Source ref: contracts/pvm/DeterministicRiskModel.sol:7-8 documents the honest rename and declares contract DeterministicRiskModel
Source refs: lib/deployment/deployMarketVersion.ts:78 and 85 deploy DeterministicRiskModel; scripts/build-pvm.mjs:15-16 builds contracts/pvm/DeterministicRiskModel.sol

frictions.description: A broad repo-wide name scan surfaced legacy PvmRiskEngine strings in generated artifacts and historical files (for example artifacts/, out/, typechain-types/, and critique docs), which would obscure the source-level rename check if not narrowed to active source roots.
frictions.resolution: Used a second source-only inspection scoped to contracts/, lib/, test/, and scripts/, matching the task instruction to verify the source contract rename.
